license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sedeba6
title: Endo H Denatured Protocol for Deglycosylating Glycoproteins
author: Mike Gibson

steps_raw.instruction: Add up to 200 μg of glycoprotein to an Eppendorf tube. Adjust to 37.5 μl final volume with de-ionized water.
Add 10 μl 5x Reaction Buffer 5.5 and 2.5 μl of Denaturation Solution. Heat at 100°C for 5 minutes.(NOTE: It is not necessary to add Triton X-100. SDS will not inactivate Endo H.)
Add 2.0 μl of Endo H to the reaction. Incubate 3 hours at 37°C.
